goal: Build a domain-randomization curriculum for Franka pick-place: 4 difficulty levels stage progressive randomization (cube position → cube color → lighting → texture). Realizes Phase 9 yrkesroll #10 (RL/sim-to-real engineer persona).
thoughts: Curriculum = staged increase of randomization complexity. Used for sim-to-real transfer training.
Stage 1: cube position randomized within 5cm. Stage 2: + color. Stage 3: + lighting intensity. Stage 4: + texture/bump.
apply_dr_preset wraps these levels. Each canonical-build picks one stage.
Function-gate: cube delivered to bin (single-cube); randomization shouldn't break delivery for stage 1-2; may stress controller at stages 3-4.
Realizes the 'fix-then-randomize' iteration pattern from sim-to-real literature.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.4, 0.2, 0.835], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=["/World/Cube_1"],
    attr="physxRigidBody:solverPositionIterationCount",
    value=16,
)

create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[-0.4, 0, 0.75], size=[0.30, 0.30, 0.15])

apply_dr_preset(
    preset_name="sim_to_real_stage_2",
    target_paths=["/World/Cube_1"],
)

add_domain_randomizer(
    target_paths=["/World/Cube_1"],
    attribute="position",
    randomization_type="continuous",
    range_min=[-0.05, -0.05, 0],
    range_max=[0.05, 0.05, 0],
)

add_domain_randomizer(
    target_paths=["/World/Cube_1"],
    attribute="color",
    randomization_type="continuous",
    range_min=[0, 0, 0],
    range_max=[1, 1, 1],
)

add_domain_randomizer(
    target_paths=["/World/DomeLight"],
    attribute="inputs:intensity",
    randomization_type="continuous",
    range_min=[600],
    range_max=[1500],
)

configure_correlated_dr(
    correlation_groups=[
        {"params": ["position", "color"], "correlation": 0.0},
    ],
)

preview_dr(n_samples=5)

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.2, 0.835], size=[0.10, 0.10, 0.06])

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path=None,
    source_paths=["/World/Cube_1"],
    destination_path="/World/Bin",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/Bin"],
)
extension_notes: RL/sim-to-real canonical. Stage 2 of 4 difficulty curriculum. Higher stages (3-4) add texture/bump that requires Mdl materials. Stage 2 keeps base controller working while exercising DR pipeline.
failure_modes: DR randomization happens at episode-reset, not within episode — single cube delivery may be unaffected by mid-run randomization
Cube position randomized at start; sensor zone fixed; if cube spawns outside sensor zone (5cm range vs 10cm zone), sensor may miss
configure_correlated_dr arg signature is speculative; handler may not exist
